card.name: Vicar Amelia
card.text: Vigilance Attacking Beasts you control have lifelink. At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 5 or more life this turn, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Altar of the Eclipse
card.text: At the beginning of your precombat main phase, you may put a ritual counter on Altar of the Eclipse, then you may cast a legendary creature card with mana value X from your hand without paying its mana cost, where X is the number of ritual counter on Altar of the Eclipse. Whenever you attack with two or more legendary creatures, draw a card.

card.name: Ebrietas of the Cosmos
card.text: Flying Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, choose up to one target nonland permanent. Its owner puts that card on the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: Brain of Mensis
card.text: Whenever a player casts a spell, you draw X cards, where X is that spell's mana value. Then if you have 14 or more cards in your hand, sacrifice Brain of Mensis. When Brain of Mensis is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, exile it. Your maximum hand size is zero for the rest of the game.

card.name: Ludwig the Accursed
card.text: Menace When Ludwig enters, mill three cards. When you do, destroy up to one target creature with mana value less than or equal to the greatest mana value among cards in your graveyard. When Ludwig dies, return him to the battlefield tapped and transformed. --- (Back): Ludwig, the Holy Blade

card.name: Ludwig, the Holy Blade
card.text: Menace, lifelink When Ludwig enters, you may return target Equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to him. --- (Front): Ludwig the Accursed

card.name: Mergo's Wet Nurse
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever Mergo's Wet Nurse attacks, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped and attacking with a finality counter on it. It gains indestructible for as long as you control Mergo's Wet Nurse.

card.name: Father Gascoigne
card.text: Haste {1}{G}: Target creature blocks Father Gascoigne this turn if able. Whenever Father Gascoigne survives damage, exile him, then return him to the battlefield transformed. --- (Back): Blood-Drunk Gascoigne

card.name: Blood-Drunk Gascoigne
card.text: Trample, haste When Blood-Drunk Gascoigne enters, he deals 2 damage to any target, then destroy up to one target artifact. --- (Front): Father Gascoigne

card.name: Laurence, the First Vicar
card.text: Trample Whenever Laurence enters or attacks or you cast a noncreature spell, Laurence deals 1 damage to each other creature, player, and planeswalker.

card.name: Great Amygdala
card.text: Reach, challenge (This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.) Great Amygdala has hexproof unless a creature has dealt combat damage this turn.

card.name: Rise of the Pale Moon
card.text: If an effect would create one or more creature tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead. At the beginning of your upkeep, if Beasts you control have total power 40 or greater, target player loses the game.

card.name: Gehrman, the First Hunter
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you've transcended the hunt, exile all other creatures and each graveyard. Each opponent's life total becomes 4. This ability triggers only once.

card.name: Moon Presence
card.text: Moon Presence enters tapped with six stun counters on it. Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, if Moon Presence is tapped, untap it. Otherwise, shuffle, then exile the top six cards of your library. You may cast a card from among them without paying its mana cost.

card.name: The One Reborn
card.text: Whenever The One Reborn attacks, you may exile a creature card from your graveyard. If you do, The One Reborn deals damage equal to that card's power to target creature defending player controls. The One Reborn has all activated and triggered abilities of creature cards exiled with it.

card.name: Lady Maria
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) [+1]: Until end of turn, Lady Maria becomes a 3/3 Warrior creature with indestructible and haste. If you've transcended the hunt, she gains double strike until end of turn. [-2]: Lady Maria deals 2 damage to any target and you gain 2 life. If you've transcended the hunt, instead Lady Maria deals 4 damage and you gain 4 life. [-6]: Exile two target permanents.

card.name: Orphan of Kos
card.text: Flying, trample When Orphan of Kos enters, create Kos's Placenta, a legendary colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +3/+3," "Whenever equipped creature attacks, destroy target noncreature, nonbasic permanent defending player controls," and equip {5}.

card.name: Simon the Harrowed
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) When Simon enters, exile target creature an opponent controls until Simon leaves the battlefield. Simon gets +2/+1 and has indestructible as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: White Church Hunter
card.text: Agile Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever another creature you control enters, you gain 1 life. If you've transcended the hunt, put a +1/+1 counter on White Church Hunter.

card.name: Wandering Nightmare
card.text: Lure (This creature must be blocked if able.) {1}{W}, Exile Wandering Nightmare from your graveyard: Target Equipment you control gains "Equipped creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control" for as long as this card remains exiled. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Annalise, Vileblood Queen
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. {3}{W}, Sacrifice a creature: Return Annalise from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: The Hunt Begins Anew
card.text: Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 2 or less from among them onto the battlefield and arm them. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Ascension of the Martyr
card.text: Each player chooses a creature they control, then sacrifices the rest. Search your library for an Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control. It gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Nightmare Host Micolash
card.text: Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell each turn, if that spell targets you or a permanent you control, counter it. Each instant and each sorcery card you own has madness. The madness cost is equal to its mana cost. (If you discard a card with madness, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Provost Willem
card.text: Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, draw two cards, then discard two cards. At the beginning of your end step, if you drew seven or more cards this turn, you may put a permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Yurie, the Last Scholar
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") {2}, Sacrifice four Blood Vials: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Fleeting Contact
card.text: Exile up to one target spell or ability, up to one target creature you control, and up to one target creature you don't control. Return each creature card exiled from the battlefield this way to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Commune with Ebrietas
card.text: Draw X cards, then discard two cards. For each nonland card discarded this way, create a 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature token.

card.name: Parting of the Great Veil
card.text: Tap up to two target creatures. Put two stun counters on each of them. Create a 3/3 green and blue Alien Horror creature token with "This creature has hexproof as long as it isn't your turn." Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control.

card.name: Black Church Hunter
card.text: Menace Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever another creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life. If you've transcended the hunt, put a +1/+1 counter on Black Church Hunter.

card.name: Merciless Trio
card.text: {B}, Pay 1 life: Merciless Trio gains trample until end of turn. {1}{B}, Pay 2 life: Merciless Trio gets +2/+2 until end of turn. {2}{B}, Pay 3 life: Draw three cards.

card.name: Mensis Kidnapper
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one target card from a graveyard. {1}{B}: Put a creature card exiled with Mensis Kidnapper onto the battlefield under your control with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Bloody Crow of Cainhurst
card.text: Deathtouch Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever Bloody Crow of Cainhurst deals combat damage to a player, if you've transcended the hunt, that player loses the game.

card.name: Night of the Plague
card.text: Spread the Scourge, then destroy all non-Beast creatures. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: The Hunter's Lament
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature. Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Search your library for a card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Hunter of Despair
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) At end of combat on your turn, if a creature died this combat and you've transcended the hunt, untap each creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Watchdog of the Old Lords
card.text: Menace If a source you control would deal damage to a permanent an opponent controls, it deals double that damage to that permanent instead.

card.name: Keeper of the Old Lords
card.text: When Keeper of the Old Lords enters, create two 2/1 red Dog creature tokens with agile. Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, creatures you control get +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Bloodlicker
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") Sacrifice a permanent: Bloodlicker gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: A Hunter Must Hunt
card.text: You can't cast more than two spells each turn. Whenever you attack, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw a card for each attacking creature you control.

card.name: Revelation of Old Blood
card.text: Scry 2. Create two Blood Vial tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") You may sacrifice another permanent. When you do, Revelation of Old Blood deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Living Failures
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, create a 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature token. At the beginning of each combat, if you control five or more Alien creatures, Alien creatures you control get +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Bloodletting Beast
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.) Whenever Bloodletting Beast attacks, any number of Beasts you control fight target creature defending player controls.

card.name: Nightmare Apostle
card.text: Flash Reach When Nightmare Apostle enters, create two 1/2 green Spider creature tokens with reach. Each attacking Spider you control assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.

card.name: Giant Fishman
card.text: Trample, haste, lure, challenge (This creature must be blocked if able. This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.)

card.name: Great Rebirth
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, search your library for a creature card with mana value 3 or less, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: The Discovery of Vermin
card.text: Reveal the top four cards of your library. You may put up to two creature or land cards from among them into your hand. Put the rest into your graveyard. You may play up to two additional lands this turn. Spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Yharnam, Pthumerian Queen
card.text: Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1. Whenever a nontoken creature an opponent controls dies, you create a token copy of it, except the token has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: The Lady's Bidding
card.text: Exile target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Winter Lantern
card.text: Menace Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, up to one target creature deals damage to itself equal to its power.

card.name: The Cosmos, of Course!
card.text: Flash At the beginning of each player's draw step, that player may draw two additional cards. If they do, they discard a card at random.

card.name: Shadows of Yharnam
card.text: Menace, deathtouch, haste Shadows of Yharnam gets +3/+3 as long as it's a Beast.

card.name: Nightmare Fog
card.text: Destroy each permanent with mana value 1 or mana value 2.

card.name: Martyr Logarius
card.text: Flash Flying, lifelink Whenever Martyr Logarius attacks, choose target creature defending player controls. If it's tapped, Martyr Logarius deals 3 damage to that creature. Otherwise, tap it.

card.name: Insignia of the League
card.text: Enchant creature When Insignia of the League enters, arm enchanted creature. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.) Enchanted creature has menace and vigilance and gets +1/+1 for each Aura and Equipment attached to it.

card.name: Witch of Hemwick
Pact of Moon and Stars
card.text: Once each turn, you may cast a permanent spell from your hand with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Eileen the Crow
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever another creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Eileen the Crow. If a creature dying causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger while you've transcended the hunt, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Powder Keg Aficionado
card.text: When Powder Keg Aficionado enters, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Blood Vial, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Darkbeast Paarl
card.text: Lure (This creature must be blocked if able.) Other Beasts you control have lure. {1}{BG}, Pay 3 life: Target Beast you control gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Valtr, Master of the League
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever Valtr attacks, create a 1/1 red and white Human Warrior creature token that's tapped and attacking. Then if you've transcended the hunt, creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain agile until end of turn.

card.name: Rom, the Vacuous Spider
card.text: {GU}: Return Rom to its owner's hand. {GU}: Rom gets +1/-1 until end of turn. {GU}{GU}{GU}: Create a 1/2 green Spider creature token with reach.

card.name: Beckoning Bell
card.text: {1}, {T}, Discard two cards: You may reveal a creature card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand.

card.name: Rakuyo
card.text: Equipped creature has triple strike. (That creature deals first-strike, regular, and last-strike combat damage.) Equip {3}

card.name: Cainhurst Throne Room
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {W}{B}, {T}: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 and gains first strike and lifelink until end of turn. Sacrifice that creature at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Astral Clocktower
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {U}{R}, {T}, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.

card.name: Nightmare Frontier
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}{B}{G}, {T}: Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a decayed counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Grand Cathedral
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}{R}{W}, {T}: Target creature you control gains vigilance and menace until end of turn. You may attach an Equipment you control to that creature.

card.name: Lumenflower Gardens
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {3}{G}{U}, {T}: Untap each Forest and each Island you control. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Blood-Healer Iosefka
card.text: Vigilance, lifelink {1}{W}, Exile Iosefka from your graveyard: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains vigilance and lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Adella the Nun
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Adella. If you've transcended the hunt, instead put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: New Hunter Captain
card.text: Agile (This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.) Whenever an Equipment you control enters, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Labyrinth Spirit
card.text: Flying When Labyrinth Spirit enters, arm up to two target creatures you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: The Doll
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) When The Doll enters, create three 1/1 white Spirit creature tokens. Other creatures you control get +1/+1 as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Art of Quickening
card.text: Arm target creature you control. It gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Hunter's Mercy
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Its controller creates two Blood Vial tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Choir Minister
card.text: Whenever Choir Minister attacks, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Bound Saint Adeline
card.text: Ward {2} Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target creature can't be blocked this turn.

card.name: Imposter Iosefka
card.text: Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, create two 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature tokens.

card.name: Great Maw
card.text: Flying When Great Maw enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: Glimpse the Truth
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a permanent with mana value 4 or greater. Draw two cards.

card.name: Silencing Blank
card.text: Counter target spell. Create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Holy Moonlight Sword
Mensis Cage
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) {1}, {T}: Each opponent loses 1 life. {4}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice Mensis Cage: Each opponent loses life equal to your hunt's intensity and you gain that much life.

card.name: Sky-Burial Remnant
card.text: Flying, lifelink, deathtouch

card.name: Cainhurst Templar
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) When Cainhurst Templar enters, you may sacrifice another creature. If you do, each opponent sacrifices a creature. Cainhurst Templar gets +2/+1 as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Loran Darkbeast
card.text: Flash Deathtouch Other attacking Beasts you control have deathtouch.

card.name: Blood-Starved Beast
card.text: Menace At the beginning of your end step, if a creature died this turn, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Alfred's Undertaking
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature with the greatest power among creatures that player controls.

card.name: Gascoigne's Music Box
Blood Moon Loyalist
card.text: Haste Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Creatures you control have haste as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Old Hunter Henryk
card.text: Trample Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Blood Minister
card.text: When Blood Minister enters, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Blood Vial token, Blood Minister deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Alfred the Executioner
card.text: When Alfred enters, arm target creature you don't control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and equip {2} attached to it. You still control the token.)

card.name: Vileblood Dragoon
card.text: Vileblood Dragoon has flying as long as it's attacking. {3}: Attach target Equipment you control to Vileblood Dragoon. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Burning of Old Yharnam
card.text: Burning of Old Yharnam deals 2 damage to each creature that isn't equipped.

card.name: Threaded Cane
Yharnam Huntsman
card.text: {2}{G}: Spread the Scourge. Activate only as a sorcery and only once. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Old Hunter Henriett
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) {2}{G}: Reveal the top three cards of your library. Choose a land card from among them. If you've transcended the hunt, choose a permanent card instead. Put the chosen card into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Beast Claw
Mergo's Widow
card.text: Reach When Mergo's Widow enters or dies, create a 1/2 green Spider creature token with reach.

card.name: Cleric Beast
card.text: Trample Whenever Cleric Beast or another Beast you control enters, you gain 3 life. Whenever Cleric Beast or another Beast you control dies, draw a card.

card.name: Beasthood's Clutches
card.text: This spell costs {2} less to cast if you control a permanent with mana value 4 or greater. Double target creature you control's power and toughness until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.

card.name: Sunset Over Yharnam
card.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Brador, Church Assassin
card.text: Lifelink Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever another creature dies, you may draw a card. If you do, you lose 3 life unless you've transcended the hunt. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Blood Ministration
card.text: Blood Ministration deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life. Spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Djura, Retired Hunter
card.text: Menace Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Djura gets +4/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Arcane Transfusion
card.text: When Arcane Transfusion enters, create two Blood Vial tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice Arcane Transfusion. When you do, it deals damage to up to one target creature or planeswalker equal to the number of cards you've drawn this turn.

card.name: Graveguard Dores
card.text: When Dores enters, return target nonland permanent card from your graveyard to your hand. If that card was put there from the battlefield this turn, return it to the battlefield instead.

card.name: Darkbeast Cemetery
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, draw a card. Whenever a permanent you control is put into the graveyard from the battlefield, you gain 1 life. If this is the third time this ability has triggered this turn, each opponent loses 3 life.

card.name: Yamamura the Wanderer
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. If it's equipped, put a +1/+1 counter on it instead.

card.name: Whirligig Saw
Celestial Emissary
card.text: When Celestial Emissary enters, create X 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature tokens, where X is the number of lands you control.

card.name: Empty Shell of Kos
card.text: When Empty Shell of Kos enters, if you cast it, draw three cards. At the beginning of your end step, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you do, it's a 2/1 green Pest creature that's still a land.

card.name: Bound Widow
card.text: Flash When Bound Widow dies, you may exile it. If you do, return target creature card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Powder Keg Initiate
card.text: Whenever Powder Keg Initiate attacks, you may sacrifice an artifact. If you do, exile target instant or sorcery card from your graveyard. You may cast it this turn. If that spell would be put into a graveyard, exile it instead. (You still pay its costs.)

card.name: Vermin Host
card.text: Deathtouch When Vermin Host enters, if you cast it, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Pthumerian Descendant
card.text: Double strike When Pthumerian Descendant enters, arm it. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Byrgenwerth Savant
card.text: When Byrgenwerth Savant enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal up to two permanent cards from among them and put those cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Isz Gargoyle
card.text: Flying When Isz Gargoyle enters, put a defender counter on it unless you pay {3}. {T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Master Willem's Thesis
card.text: {1}, {T}: Tap target creature. Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, untap Master Willem's Thesis.

card.name: Saw Cleaver
Cainhurst Stagecoach
card.text: Whenever Cainhurst Stagecoach attacks, for each creature that crewed it this turn, you may exile that creature. If you do, return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of that player's next upkeep. Crew 3

card.name: Unseen Village
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {6}, {T}: Spread the Scourge. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Gehrman's Apprentice
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Gehrman's Apprentice gets +2/+1 as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Oedon Chapel Dweller
card.text: Lifelink When Oedon Chapel Dweller dies, draw a card.

card.name: Church Servant
card.text: When Church Servant enters, arm it. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Crowfeather Hunter
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Crowfeather Hunter has flying as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Acolyte of the Holy Blade
card.text: Whenever Acolyte of the Holy Blade attacks, if it's equipped, tap or untap up to one target creature.

card.name: Plaguetide Conspiracy
card.text: Flying When Plaguetide Conspiracy enters, if you cast it, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Church Giant
card.text: When Church Giant enters, arm target creature you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.) Equipped creatures you control have vigilance.

card.name: Communion
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Hunter's Torch
Executioner's Verdict
card.text: Choose one — • Target player sacrifices an artifact or enchantment with mana value 1 or greater. • Target player sacrifices a creature with power 4 or greater.

card.name: Garden of Eyes
card.text: Flying Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Byrgenwerth Researcher
card.text: {5}{U}: Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Mensis Scholar
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, tap up to one target creature.

card.name: Choir Neophyte
card.text: When Choir Neophyte enters, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.") Whenever you sacrifice a Blood Vial token, scry 1.

card.name: Brainsucker
card.text: Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Brainsucker.

card.name: Great Womb
card.text: Flying When Great Womb enters, create a 1/1 green and blue Alien Horror creature token.

card.name: Hunter's Farewell
card.text: Counter target creature spell.

card.name: Call Beyond
card.text: Target creature's owner puts it on the top or bottom of their library. Create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Wisdom of the Great Ones
card.text: Draw three cards. Exile up to one target creature you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

card.name: Childhood's Beginning
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a blue Alien Horror creature with base power and toughness 1/1. It can't be sacrificed.

card.name: Gatekeeper Messengers
card.text: When Gatekeeper Messengers enters, arm target creature you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.) Whenever one or more tokens you control enter, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: Shrewd Old Hunter
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) {2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on Shrewd Old Hunter. This ability costs {2} less to activate if you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Beast Patient
card.text: {2}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Spread the Scourge. Activate only as a sorcery. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Charnel Crow
card.text: Flying When Charnel Crow dies, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Yharnam Stalker
card.text: Menace Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Yharnam Stalker has lifelink as long as you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Bell-Ringing Woman
card.text: When Bell-Ringing Woman enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Draw Blood
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If another creature died this turn, that creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Iosefka's Remedy
card.text: Draw two cards. You lose 2 life. Create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Grant Us Eyes
card.text: Destroy target creature. Its controller loses 2 life.

card.name: Kiss of the Plague
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. When that creature dies this turn, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Vileblood Prince
card.text: When Vileblood Prince enters, create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Mad One
card.text: Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Mad One gets +2/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Labyrinth Warrior
card.text: When Labyrinth Warrior enters, arm target creature you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Veteran's Ally
card.text: Trample Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever Veteran's Ally attacks, if you've transcended the hunt, it deals 3 damage to defending player.

card.name: Powder Keg Zealot
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Whenever Powder Keg Zealot attacks, if you've transcended the hunt, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.name: Cramped Casket
card.text: Menace Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target creature can't block this turn.

card.name: The Lady's Flames
card.text: The Lady's Flames deals 3 damage to target creature. You may put a card from your hand on the bottom of your library. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: Unlawful Carnage
card.text: Unlawful Carnage deals 5 damage to target creature and 2 damage to up to one target creature token.

card.name: Gear Up
card.text: Arm target creature you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.) Draw a card.

card.name: Into the Blood Fog
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Draw two cards. Create a Blood Vial token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.")

card.name: Afflicted Beggar
card.text: When Afflicted Beggar enters or dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Labyrinth Ritekeeper
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever a creature you control dies, untap Labyrinth Ritekeeper. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Pthumerian Delver
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) Pthumerian Delver gets +2/+2 and has challenge as long as you've transcended the hunt. (A creature with challenge can't be blocked by more than one creature.)

card.name: Yharnam's Infestation
card.text: Spread the Scourge, then spread the Scourge again. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Lesser Amygdala
card.text: Reach When Lesser Amygdala enters, arm it. You gain 2 life. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Maneater Boar
card.text: Trample When Maneater Boar enters, if you cast it, spread the Scourge. (Create a 2/2 green Beast creature token, or sacrifice a non-Beast creature to create a 3/3 token that's a copy of it, except it's a Beast.)

card.name: Scourge Beast
card.text: Vigilance Other Beasts you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Moonlit Hunt
card.text: Arm target creature you control. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Quicksilver Reflex
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Untap it. • Destroy target creature with flying.

card.name: Old Hunter's Scythe
Cain's Servant
card.text: When Cain's Servant dies, you gain 3 life.

card.name: Lost Child of Antiquity
card.text: Flying Whenever another creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Lost Child of Antiquity.

card.name: Loran Cleric
card.text: Menace When Loran Cleric enters, draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card this way, put a +1/+1 counter on Loran Cleric.

card.name: Clocktower Patient
card.text: Defender Insight — Whenever you draw your second card each turn, Clocktower Patient can attack this turn as though it didn't have defender.

card.name: Gravekeeper Scorpion
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: Snake Ball
card.text: {2}{BG}: Return Snake Ball from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Cainhurst Knight
card.text: Agile (This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.) {3}{RW}: Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Huntsman's Minion
card.text: When Huntsman's Minion enters, arm target creature you control. (Create a colorless Equipment artifact token with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2} attached to it.)

card.name: Celestial Child
card.text: When Celestial Child enters, draw a card.

card.name: Fluorescent Flower
card.text: Reach Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.)

card.name: Iosefka's Blood Vial
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice Iosefka's Blood Vial, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card. {7}, {T}, Sacrifice Iosefka's Blood Vial: Exile target nonland permanent.

card.name: Skeletal Puppets
card.text: Paleblood hunter (If the hunt has not begun, it starts at 1. It intensifies once on each of your turns when a creature dies. At 4, transcend the hunt.) When Skeletal Puppets dies, draw a card if you've transcended the hunt.

card.name: Hunter's Dream
card.text: Hunter's Dream enters tapped. When it does, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) {T}, Sacrifice Hunter's Dream: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Cathedral Ward
card.text: Cathedral Ward enters tapped unless you control a creature. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Byrgenwerth Lunarium
card.text: Byrgenwerth Lunarium enters tapped unless you control a creature. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Forbidden Woods
card.text: Forbidden Woods enters tapped unless you control a creature. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Streets of Old Yharnam
card.text: Streets of Old Yharnam enters tapped unless you control a creature. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Fishing Hamlet
card.text: Fishing Hamlet enters tapped unless you control a creature. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: 2/1 Dog BLD
card.text: Agile (This creature deals combat damage first as long as it's attacking.)

card.name: 3/3 Alien Horror BLD
card.text: This creature has hexproof as long as it isn't your turn.

card.name: 3/3 Beast BLD
card.text: This token can be used to represent a copy of something else.

card.name: 1/2 Spider BLD
card.text: Reach

card.name: Equipment BLD
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Equip {2}

card.name: Blood Vial BLD
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact, Discard a card or sacrifice another untargeted permanent: Draw a card.

card.name: Kos's Placenta BLD
The Hunt BLD
card.text: Whenever a creature dies during your turn, if your hunt's intensity is 1 or greater, increase it by 1. Transcend the hunt at 4. This ability triggers only once each turn.
